biological_replicate: we applied this method to eight modern cattle
technical_replicate: data were acquired in data-dependent acquisition (DDA) mode using Top10 method.
experimental_design: A label-free quantification method for assessing sex from modern and ancient bovine tooth enamel
factor_value: Identification of the sex of modern, fossil and archaeological animal remains
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
number_of_biological_replicates: 8 modern cattle and 12 archaeological Bos teeth
number_of_samples: 8 modern cattle and 12 archaeological Bos teeth
